title: Scaffold project-local Pi tickflow extension
description: Create .pi/extensions/tickflow/index.ts and supporting module layout for a Pi extension. Register /tickflow-run-tick and /tickflow-contract commands with argument parsing and basic UI notifications. Keep implementation minimal but reloadable with Pi /reload.
acceptance_criteria: Pi can load the extension from .pi/extensions/tickflow; /tickflow-contract <id> and /tickflow-run-tick <id> commands are registered; TypeScript has no obvious syntax errors.
closed_reason: Scaffolded .pi/extensions/tickflow with /tickflow-contract, /tickflow-run-tick, and /tickflow-run commands; validated Pi can load the extension via pi -e.
